name: Basic Brown Sugar Cookie Dough
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the butter until light.
2. Add the brown sugar and cream well.
3. Add the egg, egg yolk, vanilla, and brandy; beat until smooth.
4. Mix in the flour and salt until well blended. Chill well.
5. Lightly grease or line baking pans with parchment paper.
6. Pipe out the dough using a pastry bag or form into small wafers (about 1 1/2 x 3/8 inch).
7. Bake in an oven preheated to 375°F for 8-10 minutes, or until golden.
8. Allow to cool on the baking sheet for 2-3 minutes before transferring to a rack.
9. Store airtight.
